conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical point of adsorption for PMMA block
conditions.evidence_text: The critical point of PMMA is obtained at a composition of 73 vol% MEK/27 vol% cyclohexane... Figure 3. Chromatograms of the block copolymers... at the critical point of PMMA; Nucleosil Si-100, MEK-cyclohexane 73:27 vol%.
conditions.notes: Initial setup described in text and Figure 3 caption.

conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical point of adsorption for PMMA block
conditions.evidence_text: As can be seen in Figure 4, the critical point for PMMA is obtained at a mobile phase composition of 70 vol% MEK/30 vol% cyclohexane... Figure 5 Chromatograms... at the critical point of PMMA; LiChrospher Si-300 and Si-1000, MEK-cyclohexane 70:30 vol%.
conditions.notes: Second setup used for higher molar mass samples to avoid exclusion limit issues; distinct from the first setup due to different column system and adjusted mobile phase ratio.
